cover.subtitle: Website. SEO. Photography. Social media. Monthly strategy. One retainer. One person who already knows Balmoral inside and out.

story.headline_html:
You build exceptional homes.
People should know about it.
story.lead: Marc, over the past 12 months we’ve built Balmoral a 42-page custom website, an SEO strategy pulling organic traffic, and a digital presence that finally matches the calibre of your builds.
paragraphs: But here’s the gap: every project Balmoral completes right now is a missed marketing opportunity. Fitzsimmons North is rising in Whistler with framing complete, and there’s no professional documentation of it. No photos for the website. No content for social. No imagery for proposals. Once the drywall goes up, that story is gone.

This proposal closes that gap. It adds professional photography, social media, and monthly strategy on top of your existing web and SEO services. Three options, one partner, zero extra work on your end.

services.intro: Your current web and SEO retainer stays exactly as it is. This proposal layers professional photography, social media, and monthly strategy on top. Here’s the full scope:

cards.title: Website Management
entries: Ongoing updates and maintenance
New project pages as projects complete
Photo uploads and gallery optimization
Performance monitoring and fixes

cards.title: SEO and Content
entries: Monthly blog post, SEO-optimized
Keyword targeting and page optimization
Internal linking across all 42 pages
Local SEO for Whistler, Pemberton, Squamish

cards.title: Project Photography
entries: 1 full-day shoot per month
20 to 25 edited images per session
Drone and aerial coverage included
Multi-format delivery: web, print, social, award-ready
Full licensing for all channels
Priority scheduling, weather flexibility

cards.title: Build and Team Content
entries: Crew action shots and candid documentation
Material close-ups: timber, steel, craft details
Construction progress from framing to finish
Content built for proposals, presentations, and social

cards.title: Video and Social
entries: Monthly social media reel from shoot footage
Year-end project film (Growth and Full tiers)
Content repurposed for Instagram and LinkedIn
Monthly strategy call and content calendar

pricing.intro: Every tier includes website management and SEO. The only question is how much content you want to add. Start where it makes sense. You can always move up.

entries.text: Build and team content (crew, materials, progress)
Build and team content (crew, materials, progress)

insight.title: How to Think About This
insight.content_html: Your current retainer is $1,260/month for web and SEO. Here’s what each tier adds:

breakdowns.label: Foundation +$1,240
breakdowns.desc: 20-25 images per shoot. Your projects finally get documented properly.

breakdowns.label: Growth +$1,740
breakdowns.desc: Plus build documentation, crew content, strategy calls, and a year-end highlight film.

breakdowns.label: Creative Partner +$2,240
breakdowns.desc: The full stack. 25-30 images, year-end documentary, full social management. You never think about it.

insight.footer_html: For context: a single standalone project with video runs $3,500 to $5,500. Any of these tiers delivers that same value every month, plus website, SEO, and strategy, on a predictable budget.

roadmap.intro: The pilot runs April through June. Three months, three shoots, three chances to prove this works.

entries: Full-day session at Fitzsimmons North, Whistler, framing complete, ideal timing before envelope closes
20 to 25 edited images: structural progress, site aerials, crew at work, mountain context
Build and team content: crew action shots, timber framing details, material close-ups
Drone aerials showing the build in its Whistler setting
Project page updated with professional photography
Blog post: “Inside the Build: Fitzsimmons North”
Social media reel cut from shoot footage
Strategy call to set the Q2 content calendar
Full-day session, completed project or Fitzsimmons milestone revisit
20 to 25 edited images + drone aerials
Build documentation: progress shots, crew candids, craft details
Project page gallery refreshed with professional images
Blog post featuring the project, SEO-optimized
Social media reel from shoot content
Google review requests sent to project stakeholders
Strategy call: review performance and adjust
Full-day session, third project or Fitzsimmons completion shoot
20 to 25 edited images + drone aerials
Social media reel + LinkedIn content
Third blog post, third piece of original content in 90 days
Pilot review: what worked, what the numbers say, what comes next
If results proven: 12-month continuation locked in

vision.intro: The pilot proves the concept. A full year changes the trajectory of Balmoral’s brand. Most builders have a website. Very few have a content engine. Here’s the difference:

quarters.title: Prove the Model
quarters.description: 3 shoots. 75 images. 3 social reels. Fitzsimmons North documented through its most compelling stages. Build process captured from framing to finish. Website enriched with original content no competitor can replicate.

quarters.title: Scale the Library
quarters.description: Peak season. Long summer light for hero exteriors and twilight sessions. 150+ professional images banked. Build documentation capturing crew, craft, and progress. Six months of social reels and content ready to deploy.

quarters.title: Leverage the Work
quarters.description: Award-ready photography for CHBA and industry submissions. Year-in-review content for proposals and presentations. 225+ images. Balmoral’s online presence is unrecognizable from 12 months ago.

quarters.title: The Advantage Compounds
quarters.description: 12 months of content compounding in search rankings. 300+ images, a year-end documentary film, and a complete build documentation library working for Balmoral 24/7. Proposal-ready, award-ready, social-ready. Whether you’re on the jobsite or on vacation, your portfolio is closing the next deal.

awards.lead: Balmoral has been building luxury custom homes in the Sea-to-Sky corridor for 14 years. In that time, zero projects have been submitted for awards and zero have been pitched to publications. Meanwhile, your closest competitors are winning Georgie Awards and getting featured in magazines.
paragraphs: This isn’t about vanity. In the luxury market, awards and press are trust signals. They’re the difference between a prospect calling three builders and calling one. Every project Balmoral completes without submitting is a missed credential.

competitor_numbers.label: Georgies Held by RDC Fine Homes

awards.detail_html:
What I Handle

As your Creative Partner, every shoot is photographed to award-submission specifications from day one. 300 DPI JPEG, colour-calibrated, anonymous-ready, no people or branding in frame. When submission season opens, your images are already done. I prepare the entry materials, identify the right categories, and manage the submission process. You don’t touch any of it.

services.title: Award Submissions
entries: Georgie Awards (CHBA BC) — the standard for BC builders
CHBA National Awards for Housing Excellence
HAVAN Awards — open to all of BC
Gold Nugget Awards — North American prestige
Dezeen & AZ Awards — global recognition

services.title: Publication Pitches
entries: Western Living — BC’s top design magazine
Dwell — global residential architecture
Mountain Life — Sea-to-Sky corridor
ArchDaily & Dezeen — world’s top architecture sites
NUVO Magazine — Canadian luxury lifestyle

insight.title: One Project, Multiple Credentials
insight.content_html:
A single project photographed to spec can generate 3 to 5 credentials: a Georgie nomination, a CHBA entry, a magazine feature, an ArchDaily publication, and social content that references all of them. The photography is the foundation. Everything else builds from there.

The first step: join Sea to Sky CHBA to unlock Georgie and National eligibility. I’ll handle the rest.

paragraphs: Marc, we’ve been working together for over a year. You’ve seen what I can do with a website and an SEO strategy. This is the next step. Pick the tier that feels right, and let’s get Fitzsimmons North documented while the framing is still exposed and the story is worth telling.

The pilot is three months. If it works, we keep going. If it doesn’t, you still walk away with 75 professional images, build documentation, three social reels, three blog posts, and a website that’s stronger than it was before. There’s no downside.

steps.title: Pick Your Tier
steps.description: Foundation, Growth, or Full Creative Partner. Just let me know which feels right.

steps.title: Deposit
steps.description: 50% of the pilot total to lock in April and guarantee priority scheduling.

steps.title: Plan
steps.description: Quick 20-minute call to plan the Fitzsimmons North shoot and map out Q2.

next_steps.valid_note: This proposal is valid through April 15, 2026. After that, April availability cannot be guaranteed.
